meaning: 泽布勒赫[比利时西北部港市]
examples: The trawler had sailed from the port of Zeebrugge.
My intended nine-month journey to India had begun two days earlier at the port of Zeebrugge on the Belgian coast.
Hardly a major problem though, unless, that is, it then turns out that part of your bicycle pump has gone missing somewhere along the way from Zeebrugge.
The Baltic Ace had sailed from Zeebrugge in Belgium and was transporting Mitsubishi cars.
"If no action is taking place now, and Zeebrugge harbor is developed as planned, it might be a real problem, " Mr. Lens warned.
